item.title: New Blog
item.description: This is my testing blog.

item.title: HTB Pro Lab: FullChain — From Web Foothold to Domain Admin via ADCS ESC8 and GCP Metadata Abuse
item.description: Full pro lab walkthrough covering SSTI, NTLM relay, ADCS ESC8, Docker escape, and GCP service account privilege escalation to achieve Domain Admin and full cloud compromise.

item.title: HomeLab: Building a DevSecOps Pipeline with AWS, Terraform & GitHub Actions
item.description: A full homelab project documenting how I built an automated DevSecOps pipeline — from IaC provisioning on AWS to SAST, container scanning, and secrets detection in CI/CD.

item.title: Project: Securing a DevOps Pipeline — AWS CodePipeline Hardening
item.description: A personal project documenting the full hardening of an AWS CodePipeline deployment — from IAM least-privilege to secrets scanning, SAST integration, and container image signing.

item.title: HTB Machine: GoodGames
item.description: Full walkthrough — SSTI to Docker escape via GCP metadata abuse.

item.title: News: CISA KEV — Latest Critical CVEs
item.description: CISA adds 8 new vulnerabilities to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: PwnedLabs: GCP IAM Deep Dive
item.description: Chaining GCP IAM misconfigs to full project takeover.

item.title: HTB Pro Lab: RastaLabs — AD Attack Chain
item.description: Full RastaLabs walkthrough from zero to Domain Admin.

item.title: HTB Pro Lab: RastaLabs Writeup
item.description: Full RastaLabs pro lab walkthrough — Active Directory attack chain from zero to DA.

item.title: Active Directory Attack Notes
item.description: Personal notes on AD attack paths — Kerberoasting, ASREPRoasting, DCSync.

item.title: CyberDefenders: REvil Ransomware Lab
item.description: Memory forensics and IOC extraction from live REvil infection.

item.title: AWS S3 Misconfiguration Cheatsheet
item.description: Quick reference for S3 misconfigs — detection and remediation.

item.title: Phishing Kit Analysis: EvilProxy v2
item.description: Dissecting EvilProxy v2 AiTM kit — token theft and detection.

item.title: Azure Sentinel KQL Detection Cheatsheet
item.description: KQL queries for detecting lateral movement, persistence and exfiltration in Sentinel.

item.title: PortSwigger Web Security Academy Notes
item.description: Notes covering all Web Security Academy labs — SQLi to SSRF.

item.title: PortSwigger Web Security Academy Notes
item.description: Personal notes covering all Web Security Academy labs — SQLi to SSRF.

item.title: AWS IAM Privilege Escalation: 20 Techniques
item.description: PassRole abuse and Lambda injection with CloudTrail detection.

item.title: Azure AD Privilege Escalation Techniques
item.description: PassRole, App Registration abuse and PIM exploitation.

item.title: Dissecting EvilProxy: AiTM Phishing Kit Under the Hood
item.description: Token hijacking mechanics and Entra ID / Defender detection guide.

item.title: GCP Service Account Privilege Escalation
item.description: Over-permissioned service accounts to full project takeover.

item.title: HackingHub CTF Writeup — Web Category
item.description: XSS, IDOR and path traversal challenges from HackingHub CTF.

item.title: TryHackMe: Advent of Cyber 2024 Notes
item.description: Daily challenge notes for Advent of Cyber 2024.
